raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 2063 requires a consumer's ability to pay for home improvements to be determined prior to signing a financing agreement.",
    "PACE assessments are among the fastest growing types of property-secured financing in California.",
    "Cumulative PACE assessments grew from at least $350 million in 2014 to over $2.6 billion by the end of 2016.",
    "PACE financing can offer homeowners lower interest rates compared to traditional financing methods.",
    "PACE loans are attached by lien to the property and are paid on the property tax bill for up to 30 years.",
    "The average PACE project cost is $28,000.",
    "Property tax payments for PACE loans can significantly increase, sometimes doubling the total property tax payment."
  ]
}
```
